reminders.title: Mr. Tibbs - vet appointment
reminders.description: Annual checkup + vaccines. Hartford Animal Hospital 10 AM. Take half day.

reminders.title: Respond to Kevin - expense documentation
reminders.description: Kevin requested Oct-Dec care expense docs. Gather invoices and receipts.

reminders.title: Log January WM payment in Airtable
reminders.description: January Wethersfield Manor payment. $5,400. Log immediately.

reminders.title: Lorraine - Dr. Herrera follow-up
reminders.description: Follow-up on donepezil dosage change. CT Family Medicine 10 AM.

reminders.title: Call Robert Fairfield - estate attorney
reminders.description: Discuss Kevin's documentation requests and proxy obligations.

reminders.title: File taxes
reminders.description: TurboTax. Have W-2s from Little Acorns and Arrow. 1099-INT from Webster. 1098-E from Navient.

reminders.title: Dr. Okafor - check new dosage
reminders.description: Monthly psychiatrist appointment. Discuss sertraline 100mg adjustment.

reminders.title: Text Becca back
reminders.description: She's been texting. Respond before she calls Trevor.

reminders.title: Lease renewal decision deadline
reminders.description: Ray needs signed renewal. Rent increasing $50/month effective May.

reminders.title: Log February WM payment in Airtable
reminders.description: February payment was made 2/17 but never logged. Add date, amount ($5,200), purpose, and receipt photo before estate attorney asks.

reminders.title: Pay Wethersfield Manor - March
reminders.description: March invoice $5,200. Pay from checking, then submit reimbursement request to Robert Fairfield.
